official_ifs_requirements.requirement: Farming, growing or forestry businesses based in England can apply for on-farm trial and demonstration projects; competition closes 29 July 2026 at 11:00.
official_ifs_requirements.source: Official Full ADOPT IFS page lines 45-50

official_ifs_requirements.requirement: Project total costs must be GBP50,000 to GBP200,000 and project must include an ADOPT Project Facilitator and at least one other UK farmer, grower or forester claiming grant funding.
official_ifs_requirements.source: Official Full ADOPT IFS page lines 108-116

official_ifs_requirements.requirement: Lead must be active farming, growing or forestry business based in England, established as commercial, with eligible UK bank account, and collaborate with another farming/growing/forestry business.
official_ifs_requirements.source: Official Full ADOPT IFS page lines 121-128

official_ifs_requirements.requirement: R&A could only participate if invited by an eligible lead; partners must be invited into IFS and project must keep farming/growing/forestry eligibility and cost-balance rules.
official_ifs_requirements.source: Official Full ADOPT IFS page lines 138-160

official_ifs_requirements.requirement: England-based farmer, grower or forester can apply for GBP2,500 to engage an external registered Project Facilitator to support a Full ADOPT application.
official_ifs_requirements.source: Official Facilitator IFS page search result/opened page

official_ifs_requirements.requirement: Applicant must be an active farming, growing or forestry business based in England, engage a registered Project Facilitator, and submit a Full ADOPT application before payment evidence.
official_ifs_requirements.source: Official Facilitator IFS page search result/opened page

local_evidence_readback.finding: Full ADOPT is recorded as FARMING_LEAD_REQUIRED and Facilitator Support as NOT_ELIGIBLE_DIRECT from current evidence.
Matrix states R&A should not submit ADOPT directly; use only if an eligible farming/growing/forestry lead or client invites Aureon.
Plan marks ADOPT as unlikely fit unless an agriculture partner/use case exists.
No ADOPT, FarmPEP, ADAS, farmer, grower, forestry, CPH, or on-farm evidence file found; one unrelated PEFCphiS research PDF appeared on broad agro terms.

drive_searches.result_summary: Returned broad grant/planning files and unrelated technical files. No active England farming/growing/forestry applicant evidence or ADOPT facilitator engagement found.
Returned War Room/codex/writing files and unrelated material. No confirmed farm business, farm site, CPH, or England farm lead evidence found.
Returned planning and unrelated files. No registered ADOPT Project Facilitator engagement or invoice evidence found.

drive_files_inspected.title: RA_Grant_War_Room_Package.md
drive_files_inspected.finding: Planning package classifies Full ADOPT as not viable because it is England farming only and R&A is Northern Ireland/not farming. It does not evidence an eligible farm lead or facilitator route.

route_action.reason: Official ADOPT rules require active England farming/growing/forestry applicant evidence and farming consortium/facilitator evidence. Current Aureon evidence does not confirm those gates.

next_actions: Do not submit Full ADOPT directly as R&A.
Do not submit ADOPT Facilitator Support directly as R&A.

Only change Full ADOPT to draft-ready if an active England farming/growing/forestry lead and another UK farming/growing/forestry partner invite Aureon with project role, site, facilitator and cost evidence.
Only change Facilitator Support to draft-ready if an eligible England farming/growing/forestry applicant engages a registered Project Facilitator and asks Aureon to support the application record.
controls: No unsupported farming lead claim made
No unsupported Project Facilitator claim made
No unsupported farm site, CPH, permit, collaborator, budget, or partner invite claim made
No IFS portal mutation, email, upload, partner invite, or final submission performed
